sutta: monks he gives clean things what is choice proper at fitting times and with care he gives repeatedly and giving calms his mind after giving his glad monks these are the 8 gifts of a good man that's the end of the sukta so the good man practices giving first he gives clean things clean things not not not in the sense that what is meant here they are not stolen they are not stolen things what is choice what is good no he does not give 1 his fit to be thrown away what his choice things are and proper proper things fitting things to give at fitting times with care he gives repeatedly and giving calms his mind and after giving he is glad these are the 8 gifts of a good man the next
